name: Cryptokoyn
description: Financial portal and token hub for CryptoKoyn (CKY) — the fungible ERC-1155 currency of the Cyberia Online ecosystem. Staking, governance, analytics, and wallet management.

name: Cryptokoyn
description: Financial portal and token hub for CryptoKoyn (CKY) — the fungible ERC-1155 currency of the Cyberia Online ecosystem.

acceptedAnswer.text: CryptoKoyn (CKY) is a fungible ERC-1155 token that serves as the primary currency within the Cyberia Online ecosystem. It can be used for in-game transactions, staking, and governance voting.

mainEntity.name: How do I stake CKY tokens?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can stake CKY tokens through the Cryptokoyn staking dashboard. Connect your wallet, select the amount you wish to stake, and confirm the transaction to start earning rewards.
Yes, the Cryptokoyn portal is free to use. You only need a compatible web browser and a wallet to interact with the blockchain features.
